name: playwright
description: Browser automation via Playwright. Use during the validator stage for E2E checks against the running preview deployment.

tools.name: playwright_navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL in a headless browser.

tools.name: playwright_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page. The validator uses this to capture evidence of UI state.

tools.name: playwright_assert_text
tools.description: Assert that a CSS selector contains expected text. The validator uses this for E2E acceptance criteria checks.

tools.name: playwright_click
tools.description: Click an element. Use to navigate flows, submit forms, trigger state changes.

tools.name: playwright_fill
tools.description: Fill an input field. Use to drive form-based flows.
